title: Elevator Out of Service — Scheduled Inspection, June 10, 2026
body: Please be advised that a scheduled elevator inspection will take place on Wednesday, June 10, 2026, commencing at 9:00 AM. The elevator will be out of service for approximately three to four hours during this time. Residents who require elevator access during the morning hours are encouraged to plan accordingly. We anticipate service will be restored by early afternoon and thank you in advance for your cooperation and patience.

title: Damaged Tree Near Garage Entrance — Safety Alert
body: Residents, please be aware that a tree section near the dumpster area at the end of the driveway has sustained damage and is currently resting against neighboring branches and overhead Verizon lines. The Fire Department visited the site this evening and assessed the situation. Because the tree sits beyond our fence line as part of the aqueduct property, responsibility for removal falls outside our jurisdiction. We have already reached out to the county Department of Public Works and are awaiting their direction on next steps. In the meantime, we ask everyone to take extra care when pulling in or out of the garage and when passing through that area on foot. Your safety is our priority. We will keep you updated as the situation develops.

title: Welcome to the 555 McLean Ave Resident Portal
body: This website is your central resource for building news, meeting schedules, and community announcements. Bookmark this page and check back regularly for updates.

title: Spring Building Inspection
body: Our annual spring inspection of common areas, roof, and mechanical systems is underway. Access to certain areas may be temporarily restricted. Thank you for your patience.

title: Maintenance Fee Payment Reminder
body: Monthly maintenance fees are due on the 1st of each month. Please ensure payments are submitted on time to avoid late charges. Contact the managing agent with any questions.
